title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team has completed a triage of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- `spam_wave_42` — Banned for distributing phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- `toxic_runner` — Banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- `new_member_17` — Warned for an off-topic post in #introductions. Please review channel guidelines.
- `bot_like_user_77` — Warned for repeated near-identical replies in help channels. Please ensure responses are genuine.

**Closed without action (2)**
- A dispute report involving a trusted community helper was reviewed and dismissed; the report arose from a moderation disagreement and did not meet the threshold for sanction.
- A high-severity report against a core maintainer was identified as a false positive resulting from a coordinated brigading campaign and has been closed.

All 6 open reports have been resolved. If you have concerns about community conduct, please use the standard reporting process. Thank you for helping keep this community safe.
